{{Quote|It's a '''private merchant ship--!''' Someone's scuttled it '''good'''... and '''recently!''' Carries '''House of Tagge''' markings... can't believe the '''Empire''' would let this happen to an outfit with '''their''' influence!|Han Solo|<ref name="SW18:TES" />}}
'''[[House of Tagge/Legends|House of Tagge]] merchant ships''' were large freighters built and used by [[Tagge Company/Legends|TaggeCo]].<ref name="SW18:TES" />

==History==
Such vessels carried profits from [[The Wheel/Legends|the ''Wheel'']] to more coreward banks. Many such vessels were piratized by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces of [[Sector Commander]] [[Zertik Strom/Legends|Strom]]. The wealth was taken for the Empire and the ships left destroyed.<ref name="SW18:TES" />

The Empire framed the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] as responsible for the attacks in an maneuver to persuade the residents of the Wheel to welcome an Imperial military presence, thus ensuring the Empire could peaceably nationalize the gambling establishment.<ref name="SW19:TUG">[[Star Wars (1977) 19|''Star Wars'' (1977) 19]]</ref>
